title: Zhongshan, Guangdong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zhongshan, Guangdong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zhongshan is a city in Guangdong with a population of 4,418,000. A manufacturing city in the Pearl River Delta, named after Sun Yat-sen, with a strong lighting and hardware industry.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
